text:
On Sun, Oct 18, 2009 at 9:20 AM, wen heping <wenheping@gmail.com> wrote:

> Hi, Sylvio:
>
>     The Synopsis should be:
>
>     - [PATCH] net/tintin: update to 1.99.8
>     +[PATCH] net/tintin++devel: update to 1.99.8
>

Sorry, it should be
+[PATCH] net/tintin++-devel: update to 1.99.8


>
>
>
> Regards,
> wen
>
